resources.string: Screen4Claw Device Service - Provides accessibility control and screen capture functionality
Used for UI control and automation operations

ForClaw needs to use Android Accessibility Service (AccessibilityService) to implement the following core features:

• Read screen content: Get UI elements of current interface so AI understands what is displayed
• Automation: Execute tap, swipe, type and other operations based on your commands
• Navigation: Perform back, home and other navigation operations

This app will not collect, store or share your personal data through accessibility service. All screen information is processed locally on device for executing your AI commands.

Tap "Agree & Continue" to confirm you understand and authorize this app to use accessibility service.

ForClaw needs to use screen recording (MediaProjection) to implement the following core features:

• Capture screen: Get current screenshot so AI understands what you are viewing
• Analyze UI elements: Identify buttons, text and other elements on screen to assist automation

Screenshots are processed locally on device and will not be uploaded or shared with third parties.

Tap "Agree & Continue" to confirm you understand and authorize this app to use screen recording.

ForClaw needs "All Files Access" permission to implement the following core features:

• File management: AI reads, creates and edits files on device based on your commands
• Configuration storage: Save app configuration, chat history and skill plugins
• Screenshot saving: Save screenshots for AI analysis

This app only accesses files when you initiate commands and does not scan or upload your files in background.

Tap "Agree & Continue" to confirm you understand and authorize this app to access device files.
Accessibility and screen capture services activated
